questions.query: What is the legacy and accreditation status of Parul University?
questions.answer: Parul University has a legacy of three decades in higher education. It is designated as a Centre of Excellence by the Government of Gujarat and holds a NAAC A++ accreditation, placing it among the top 1.8% universities in India to achieve this in its first cycle.

questions.query: What are Parul University's notable rankings?
questions.answer: Parul University is ranked among the Top 50 Institutions in India for Innovation by NIRF 2025 for four consecutive years and is also ranked among the Top 150 Universities in India overall. It holds a notable rank in the 1001-1500 band in the World University Rankings and Top 50 in India by THE Impact Rankings. Additionally, it received a Diamond rating in the 2025 QS i-gauge ratings and is designated as a Category 1 University by UGC with a Grant of Graded Autonomy.

questions.query: Describe the student community and campus of Parul University.
questions.answer: Parul University has a community of over 65,000+ students, including 5,500+ international students from 75+ countries, making it a leading education destination with national and global diversities. The University is spread across a 200+ acre eco-friendly campus.

questions.query: What are some of the world-class learning facilities available at Parul University?
questions.answer: The University's 200+ acre campus is equipped with leading facilities such as a micro-nano technology lab (funded by Industrial Commissionerate, GoG), a NABL accredited Environment Lab, AICTE supported Idea lab and drone lab, a Centre for Future Skills (in collaboration with National Skill Development Centre), 'Pragy' medical skills and simulation centre, and a 1000-bedded teaching hospital.

questions.query: How does Parul University align its academics with national educational policies and what is its program offering?
questions.answer: Parul University ensures full alignment of its academics with NEP 2020, offering holistic and interdisciplinary learning across 250+ programs in leading faculties. These programs include 138 Bachelor programs, 41 Diploma programs, 35 Dual Degree programs, 2 Global Programs, 10 Industry Embedded programs, and 168 Master programs.

questions.query: Who is the President of Parul University and what are his key contributions?
questions.answer: Dr. Devanshu Patel is the President of Parul University. He holds a Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery and Doctor of Medicine (Pharmacology) from Maharaja Sayajirao University of Baroda. His contributions include establishing state-of-the-art educational institutions, promoting research through conferences and support for grants, fostering internationalization through MOUs with global institutions, and initiating entrepreneurship development through the Entrepreneurship Development Cell. He also started Continuous Education Programs, Work-Integrated Programs, and Executive Development Programs.

questions.query: What is the role and background of Dr. Parul Patel?
questions.answer: Dr. Parul Patel serves as the Vice President (Student Affairs & General Administration) and Chair Admissions Committee of Parul University. She holds an M.D. in Organon from Hemchandracharya North Gujarat University, Patan, and previously served as a Professor in Rajkot Homoeopathic Medical College for 8 years. She personally guides over 8000 students annually through the admission process and has led awareness campaigns enlightening over 15,000 students about admissions in various courses across Gujarat.

questions.query: What is the vision and mission of Parul University?
questions.answer: Parul University's vision is to achieve successful academic quests through entrepreneurship, research, modernization, and partnerships, aiming to be the finest educational destination. Its mission is to empower individuals through innovative education, foster inclusivity, and drive impactful research that advances knowledge and serves society.

questions.query: What are the key advantages of choosing Parul University?
questions.answer: Choosing Parul University offers a unique learning environment with boundless options (250+ multidisciplinary programs), top national and global rankings, comprehensive learning blending classroom with real-world applications, and leading global exposure through partnerships and exchanges. It also provides limitless career avenues with industrial ties to over 800+ companies annually, leading to opportunities for 24,000 students.

questions.query: What are the placement statistics and notable alumni achievements mentioned for Parul University?
questions.answer: Parul University boasts an average package of 5-6 LPA and a highest package offered of 60 LPA. It has over 2,200 recruiters. Notable graduates include Tanish Patel & Suraj Jagtap (60 LPA at Microsoft), Soumya Dhakad (43 LPA at ServiceNow), Suhani Shah (placed at Goldman Sachs), and Kondapalli Shanmukha Sai Ram (26 LPA at BP technology).

questions.query: How can prospective students apply for admission to Parul University?
questions.answer: Students can apply by visiting the online portal at https://admissions.paruluniversity.ac.in. The process involves filling out the initial online application form with correct primary, academic, and personal information, choosing a program based on qualifications, registering and paying the registration fee online, and optionally selecting preferred hostel accommodation.

questions.query: What types of academic programs are offered at Parul University?
questions.answer: Parul University offers a comprehensive range of programs including 138 Bachelor programs, 41 Diploma programs, 35 Dual Degree programs, 2 Global Programs, 10 Industry Embedded programs, and 168 Master programs.

questions.query: What are Parul University's key recognitions relevant to admissions?
questions.answer: Parul University entered the QS Asia University Rankings 2026 in the 1001–1100 band. It received an A++ grade from NAAC in its first accreditation cycle. In NIRF rankings, it achieved an all-India rank of 41 in Pharmacy, was placed among the top 50 institutions in the Innovation category, and is positioned within the 101–150 rank band in the overall University category.

questions.query: What additional support and opportunities are available for students while studying at Parul University?
questions.answer: While studying, students can get information on scholarships, grants, and student loans for financing education. They receive career development support for placements, training for Civil Services (UPSC & GPSC) with competitive exam coaching, Armed Force training opportunities, and mentorship and support for entrepreneurship and start-ups.

questions.query: What support services does the Office of International Affairs provide for international students?
questions.answer: The Office of International Affairs assists international students with hostel and residence, travel assistance, student welfare, FRRO registration, cultural events & activities, and academic support & assistance. They also offer language and cultural training, including coaching for language tests like IELTS and pre-departure orientation programs.

questions.query: Describe the campus facilities available to international students at Parul University.
questions.answer: Parul University provides state-of-the-art facilities including specialized labs (simulation labs for medical students, mock aircraft for aviation, moot courts for law students), a network of 10 digital libraries connected to a central library ('Gyanoday Bhawan') with access to e-resources, and campus amenities for hostel residents like gymnasiums, swimming pools, open-air theaters, and banking services. On-campus food courts and canteens serve a variety of hygienic and healthy cuisines.

questions.query: Why is India recommended as a destination for education by Parul University?
questions.answer: India is presented as a land of global ambitions, deep knowledge traditions, and rising opportunities. It is one of the world’s fastest-growing knowledge economies, offering a rich ecosystem for higher education, research, and innovation. It provides an immersive learning experience with diverse cultures, languages, and industries, and is a global hub for technology, healthcare, engineering, and entrepreneurship, creating pathways for international internships and employability. It also offers affordable, high-quality education.

questions.query: What makes Gujarat and Vadodara suitable locations for international students?
questions.answer: Gujarat is highlighted as India’s growth engine, safe, stable, and industrially advanced, with major sectors like manufacturing, pharmaceuticals, IT, energy, and finance. It has strong infrastructure and a thriving entrepreneurial spirit. Vadodara, known as Gujarat’s educational and cultural capital, offers a rapidly growing urban economy, affordable cost of living, safe neighborhoods, accessible amenities, and excellent connectivity to major cities, providing a cosmopolitan environment for international students.

questions.query: What cultural engagement opportunities are available for international students at Parul University?
questions.answer: The campus fosters mutual respect and understanding through cultural diversity. International students can engage in cultural festivals like Dhoom-Annual Cultural Fest, International Folklore Festival, and Freshers’ fest, where they showcase their heritage. They can also join International Student Clubs such as Dance Clubs, Culture and Arts Club, and Scripture, and participate in National Day Celebrations.

questions.query: Who are some of the renowned international icons and personalities that students at Parul University have opportunities to meet?
questions.answer: Parul University provides opportunities for students to meet renowned personalities such as Dr. S. Jaishankar (Minister of External Affairs, Government of India), Kiran Bedi (First Indian Woman IPS Officer, Former Lt. Governor of Puducherry), Gaur Gopal Das (Monk, Lifestyle Coach, and Author), Saina Nehwal (Indian Badminton Player), Shri Anand Kumar (Founder, Super 30), Dr. Neerja Birla (Chairperson, Aditya Birla Education Trust & Mental Health Activist), Guneet Monga Kapoor (Academy Award-Winning Film Producer), and Srikanth Bolla (Indian industrialist and founder of Bollant Industries).

questions.query: What is Parul University's philosophy regarding its fee structure for domestic students?
questions.answer: Parul University aims to offer world-class education that is both accessible and affordable. Its fee structures are designed to reflect the value of its academic programs while ensuring transparency and convenience for students and parents.

questions.query: Does Parul University offer financial support or scholarships related to fees?
questions.answer: Yes, Parul University offers a range of sports scholarships designed to empower aspiring athletes, providing financial support and opening doors to personal development and academic achievement.

questions.query: What are the different levels of programs for which fee structures are available?
questions.answer: Fee structures are available for various program levels including Diploma, Bachelors Programs, Masters programs, Dual Degree, Doctoral & Post-doctoral Program, Industry Embedded, Pathway Program, Global Programs, Certificate Programs, Long term, Short term, Inbound, Outbound, and Health Sector Skill Programs.

questions.query: For which faculties are specific annual fees mentioned in the provided text?
questions.answer: Specific annual fees are mentioned for certain programs within the Faculty of Design and Faculty of Fine Arts. For example, Diploma in Design programs are 1,75,000 per year, Bachelor of Science in Animation and VFX is 1,75,000 per year, Bachelor of Design programs are 3,25,000 per year, Master of Design in Fashion Merchandising is 1,85,000 per year. For Fine Arts, Bachelor of Visual Arts and Master of Visual Arts programs are 81,000 per year.

questions.query: Are the annual fees for all courses explicitly listed in the provided text?
questions.answer: No, the annual fees are not explicitly listed for all courses across all faculties. While the text provides a comprehensive list of courses and their durations under various faculties, specific annual fee amounts are only detailed for a limited number of programs, primarily within the Faculty of Design and Faculty of Fine Arts.

questions.query: What is the annual fee for Bachelor of Design programs in Visual Communication, Interior and Furniture Design, Product Design, and Fashion Design and Technology?
questions.answer: The annual fee for Bachelor of Design programs in Visual Communication, Interior and Furniture Design, Product Design, and Fashion Design and Technology is 3,25,000.

questions.query: What is the annual fee for Bachelor of Visual Arts programs at Parul University?
questions.answer: The annual fee for Bachelor of Visual Arts programs in Applied Arts, Sculpture, Painting, and Foundation is 81,000 per year.

questions.query: What is the annual fee for Master of Visual Arts programs at Parul University?
questions.answer: The annual fee for Master of Visual Arts programs in Applied Arts, Painting, and Art & Heritage Management is 81,000 per year.

questions.query: What is the annual fee for Diploma in Design programs in Communication Design, Product Design, Interior and Furniture Design, and Fashion Design and Technology?
questions.answer: The annual fee for Diploma in Design programs in Communication Design, Product Design, Interior and Furniture Design, and Fashion Design and Technology is 1,75,000 per year.

questions.query: Is there a separate fee structure for international students, and if so, are specific fees listed?
questions.answer: Yes, there is a section titled 'International Students Fees Structure at Parul University'. However, similar to the domestic fees section, it states that fee structures are designed to reflect value and ensure transparency, but it does not list specific annual fee amounts for any international programs in the provided text. It only lists categories like Diploma, Bachelors, Masters, etc.

questions.query: What is the primary purpose of Parul University's scholarship schemes?
questions.answer: Parul University's scholarship schemes are designed to empower ambitious learners by providing essential financial support to secure their academic future, nurture talent, and help students explore their passion while pursuing academics. They aim to build skills, confidence, and future opportunities.

questions.query: What are the three main categories of scholarships offered by Parul University?
questions.answer: Parul University offers three main categories of scholarships: Cultural Scholarships, Sports Scholarships, and Defence Scholarships.

questions.query: Describe the Sports Scholarship scheme, including eligibility and benefits for top-tier medalists.
questions.answer: The Sports Scholarship scheme offers full and partial scholarships, fellowships, stipends, and fee relaxations for deserving players/athletes. For A+ Grade medalists (First 3 Positions) in Olympic Games/Paralympic Games, World Cups/Championships, Asian Games/Para Asian Games, Commonwealth Games, Asian Cups/Championships, and World University Games/Championships, the scholarship covers 100% of tuition fees and other fees, 100% of hostel and food fees, and a stipend of 20,000 per month.

questions.query: What are the benefits for A Grade medalists in Maka Games (Khelo India University Games, All India Inter–University, Senior National, Khelo India Youth Games)?
questions.answer: For A Grade medalists in Maka Games, Gold, Silver, and Bronze medalists receive 100% tuition fee and other fees waiver. Additionally, they receive stipends of 4500 (Gold), 4000 (Silver), and 3500 (Bronze) per month.

questions.query: What are the eligibility criteria for the Cultural Scholarship scheme?
questions.answer: The Cultural Scholarship is for students who have excelled in co-curricular activities like dance, drama, music, painting, sculpture, and literature. Students who have represented their school/college up to 12th standard in Cultural/Literary Activities at State/National/International Level Competitions and won prizes (I, II, or III only) are eligible. They also need to reflect a high code of conduct, significant social involvement, and active participation.

questions.query: How can students apply for the Cultural Scholarship and what documents are required?
questions.answer: Candidates wishing to avail the tuition fee waiver scheme for cultural scholarships need to submit a Recommendation Letter and a 1-minute WhatsApp Video from a Mentoring Institute, Academy, Private Tutor, or Guru. They also need documentary proofs of awards, certificates, or participation, and a minimum of 2 references from individuals associated with them in the same co-curricular activity. Applications with relevant testimonials can be sent to cultural.scholarships@paruluniversity.ac.in.

questions.query: What tuition fee waivers are offered under the Cultural Scholarship based on the level of achievement?
questions.answer: The University offers tuition fee waivers based on the level of achievement: 25% for District Level awards, 50% for State Level awards, 75% for Zonal Level awards, and 100% for National/International Level awards.

questions.query: What is the purpose of the Defence Scholarship and which defence forces are included?
questions.answer: The Defence Scholarship scheme is introduced to honor the Defence Forces for their unparalleled feats and sacrifices for the nation by extending requisite resources and an all-encompassing education to students with a defence forces background. The included services are the Indian Army, Indian Navy, Indian Air Force, and Indian Coast Guard.

questions.query: What are the tuition fee waivers for dependents of defence personnel under the Defence Scholarship?
questions.answer: Dependents of defence personnel killed in action/peace time with death attributable to military service receive a 50% tuition fee waiver (Category C). All dependents of recipients of Gallantry awards (Paramvir Chakra, Ashok Chakra, Mahavir Chakra, Kirti Chakra, Veer Chakra, Shaurya Chakra, and Sena Medal/NauSena Medal/Vayu Sena Medal) receive a 40% tuition fee waiver (Category D). Dependents of Serving personnel/retired personnel from all mentioned defence forces receive a 30% tuition fee waiver (Category E).

questions.query: What are some general terms and conditions for all scholarship schemes at Parul University?
questions.answer: Scholarships are subject to verification of information and documents. Applicants eligible for multiple schemes must opt for only one. Scholarships are offered at the time of admission and must be applied for then. They apply to the course fee for the normal duration of the course but not for backlog/re-appear/examination fees. Scholarships can be cancelled if false information is found or if disciplinary action is taken against the student. Certain courses like MBBS, BAMS, BHMS, BPT, B.Sc Nursing, B.Pharm, Pharm D, Ph.D, MD, MS, and MPT are excluded from these scholarships.

questions.query: What is the primary goal of Parul University's Training and Placement Cell?
questions.answer: The primary goal of Parul University's Training and Placement Cell is to ensure that every student is equipped with the skills, experience, and opportunities needed to secure a successful career by integrating academia and industry demands.

questions.query: What are the key services provided by the Training and Placement Cell to enhance student employability?
questions.answer: The Training and Placement Cell facilitates students' career journeys by connecting them with top recruiters, providing industry-focused training, and offering comprehensive career support. This includes holistic skill development through structured training programs such as technical skill workshops, aptitude training, communication skills, and soft skills training.

questions.query: What are the overall placement statistics and highest package offered at Parul University?
questions.answer: Parul University has placed over 20,000 students with 2,200+ recruiters. The highest package offered is 60 Lacs.

questions.query: Who are some of the top recruiters and what are some notable student placements?
questions.answer: While a full list of top recruiters is not provided, the text mentions that industrial ties exist with over 800+ companies annually. Notable student placements include Suraj Jagtap & Tanish Patel at Microsoft with a 60 LPA package, Soumya Dhakad at ServiceNow with a 43 LPA package, Suhani Shah placed at Goldman Sachs, and Kondapalli Shanmukha Sai Ram at BP technology with a 26 LPA package.

questions.query: What is the 'One Student-One Job Policy' in Parul University's placement policy?
questions.answer: Under the 'One Student-One Job Policy,' students cannot participate in further placement processes after receiving a job offer. An exception is made if the CTC package of a subsequent company's offer is at least double the original offer, allowing participation in one additional selection process. Students can also switch to a 'Dream Company' offer, leaving their previous offer.

questions.query: How does the placement policy handle Pre-Placement Offers (PPO) and 'Dream Company' offers?
questions.answer: Students with accepted PPOs cannot participate further in placement drives, except for 'Dream Company' options. If a student receives a 'Dream Company' offer, they are allowed to opt for it, even if they have a previous offer.

questions.query: What are the rules regarding branch and profile for placement activities?
questions.answer: Core branch students who are placed in software companies are still permitted to appear in Core companies. If a student is placed in a non-technical profile, they are allowed to participate in further campus drives for technical profiles. This exception does not apply to management and technical sales students.

questions.query: What is the policy regarding discipline and decorum during placement activities?
questions.answer: Students are required to maintain the highest decorum during all placement activities. Any act of indiscipline or misbehavior will result in debarment from participating in further placement activities.

questions.query: Which faculties have their leading recruiters listed or mentioned in the placement section?
questions.answer: The text mentions 'Our Leading Recruiters Faculty wise' and lists the following faculties: Engineering Technology, Liberal Arts, Commerce, Agriculture, Architecture Planning, Ayurved, Fine Arts, IT Computer Science, Law, Library And Information Science, Management Studies, Nursing, Department of Paramedical And Health Sciences, Pharmacy, Department of Public Health, Social Work, Applied Sciences, and Physiotherapy.

questions.query: Who is the Director of the Training & Placement Cell and what is his message?
questions.answer: Mr. Gurcharan Singh is the Director - Training & Placement Cell. His message emphasizes the significance of providing industry-tailored education. He states that Parul University uniquely designs its education to integrate both academia and industry, producing highly trained and competent resources, and that the T&P Cell is dedicated to equipping students with skills, experience, and opportunities for successful careers.

questions.query: What is the overall vision and geographical spread of Parul University's campuses?
questions.answer: Parul University aims to deliver unparalleled education focusing on promoting research, advancing innovation, and ensuring quality education across India. Its campuses are spread across four locations, serving as hallmarks of excellence.

questions.query: Describe the Parul University campus located in Vadodara.
questions.answer: The Vadodara campus is described as a leading state-of-the-campus situated in the cultural capital of Gujarat.

questions.query: What are the key features of Parul University's campus in Goa?
questions.answer: The Goa campus is characterized as a world-class campus located in the heart of a tropical paradise.

questions.query: How is the Ahmedabad campus of Parul University distinguished?
questions.answer: The Ahmedabad campus is noted as a heritage campus that carries a legacy of shaping quality in education.

questions.query: What is the focus of the Parul University campus in Rajkot?
questions.answer: The Rajkot campus is described as a unique destination for education, specifically focusing on academic excellence.

questions.query: What is the overall scale and design philosophy behind Parul University's infrastructure?
questions.answer: Parul University boasts an infrastructure spanning over 200 acres, catering to more than 65,000 students. Its facilities are designed to foster creativity and enhance well-being, offering world-class learning environments tailored for study, leisure, and university lifestyle.

questions.query: Detail the residential and daily convenience facilities available to students on campus.
questions.answer: The university provides safe, secure, and social residencies and hostels with separate accommodations for male and female students, equipped with modern facilities, spacious rooms, Wi-Fi, and 24/7 security. Additionally, an on-campus supermarket offers groceries, fresh produce, snacks, beverages, and personal care items for convenient daily shopping.

questions.query: What advanced facilities are available for academic learning, practical skills, and research?
questions.answer: Parul University offers cutting-edge laboratories with advanced technologies and tools for practical learning, promoting skills, creativity, and research. Its libraries serve as knowledge hubs with vast collections of books, journals, e-resources, and digital materials, providing a tranquil environment for focused study. Workshops are equipped with modern tools and machinery for hands-on training across various disciplines.

questions.query: Describe the sports and fitness amenities provided at Parul University.
questions.answer: The university features world-class swimming pools, an expansive Outdoor Sports Complex with professional-grade facilities for cricket, football, basketball, volleyball, and tennis, and an Indoor Sports Complex for badminton, table tennis, and squash. A modern Gym & Fitness Centre caters to all fitness levels with state-of-the-art equipment and certified trainers. A unique Horse Riding Arena is also available.

questions.query: What dining and healthcare services are accessible on the Parul University campus?
questions.answer: Students can enjoy a delightful eating experience at multi-cuisine food courts offering a wide variety of Indian and international favorites in a hygienic environment. For healthcare, a 1,000+ bed on-campus hospital provides comprehensive services, qualified medical staff, emergency services, and regular health check-ups 24/7.

questions.query: How does Parul University enhance campus life through recreational and convenience hubs?
questions.answer: The campus features an open-air Amphitheatre for performances and cultural events, and Watcher’s Park for relaxation and movie nights. For convenience, an e-mobility initiative offers eco-friendly transportation like E-Rickshaws and 'My Bike,' and multiple ATMs and bank facilities are available on campus for financial transactions.

questions.query: What is the overarching philosophy of student life at Parul University?
questions.answer: Student life at Parul University is designed to be a thrilling and vibrant journey that transcends academics, transforming into an extraordinary experience filled with excitement, exploration, and rich cultural flair. It is considered a premier destination for enjoyment and involvement.

questions.query: What types of major entertainment and cultural events are organized for students?
questions.answer: Parul University hosts thrilling concerts and EDMs with big artists and DJs, including annual Music Festivals covering genres from rock and pop to Bollywood fusion. Examples include Anuv Jain, Supersonic EDM night, Vishal Shekhar, and Jigardan Gadhvi concerts.

questions.query: How does Parul University welcome new students and what activities are part of this welcome?
questions.answer: New students are welcomed with an 'epic Freshers’ Fest,' a vibrant celebration featuring live performances, games, talent showcases, competitions, and orientation activities, designed to help them meet new friends and kick off their university journey.

questions.query: What opportunities do students have to interact with celebrities on campus?
questions.answer: Parul University frequently brings Bollywood stars and sports legends to campus for special events, talk shows, interactive sessions, motivational talks, Q&A sessions, and exclusive meet-and-greets. Notable past guests include Alia Bhatt, Ranveer Singh, Ayushman Khurrana, PV Sindhu, Saif Ali Khan, and Nora Fatehi.

questions.query: Describe the evening activities and social hangouts available to students at Parul University.
questions.answer: Evenings at Parul University are vibrant with endless possibilities, including open mic nights, stand-up comedy, cultural performances, karaoke sessions, movie nights under the stars, campfire gatherings, and themed social events. Specific offerings include open-air movie screenings, stand-up comedy nights, and evening musical nights with food stalls, music, and art displays.

questions.query: How does Parul University support student engagement in sports and fitness?
questions.answer: The university encourages a competitive spirit through inter-university tournaments and championships, including its own PU Premier League for cricket and an Annual Sports Fest with inter-college competitions. Students also have access to indoor sports arenas, swimming pools, fitness centers, fitness challenges, and yoga workshops.

questions.query: What opportunities are available for students to join clubs and participate in cultural festivals?
questions.answer: Students can join over 50 student clubs catering to diverse interests such as dance, music, photography, debate, and coding, which host regular workshops, competitions, and events. The campus also celebrates annual festivals like Navratri (with Garba dancing), Diwali, Holi, Christmas, Pongal, and the Dhoom cultural fest, featuring fashion shows, dance battles, and culinary contests.

questions.query: What is the significance of the annual Convocation Ceremony at Parul University?
questions.answer: The annual Convocation Ceremony is a monumental, grand-scale celebration marking the beginning of graduates' professional journeys and a tradition of excellence. It hosts thousands of graduates (often over 12,000 across diverse fields), proud parents, and esteemed global dignitaries, distinguished by the presence of nationally and internationally renowned Chief Guests and Guests of Honour.

questions.query: What is the primary objective of the educational events hosted at Parul University?
questions.answer: The primary objective of educational events at Parul University is to provide immersive experiences that blend knowledge, innovation, creativity, and real-world applications, aiming to make learning a lifetime experience where students don't just learn but 'become it.'

questions.query: What are the key events related to Design and Film at Parul University?
questions.answer: Parul University hosts the Vadodara Fashion Week, a spectacular fashion show showcasing designs from graduating students, and the Vadodara Film and Design Festival, a creative festival allowing students to explore filmmaking and design through expert-led workshops and sessions.

questions.query: What events are organized to promote Technology and Innovation among students?
questions.answer: For Technology and Innovation, the university organizes 'Projections,' a platform for students to push boundaries in technology and engineering through innovative projects, and the 'Tech Expo,' an annual festival where students showcase their final-year projects and groundbreaking technological innovations.

questions.query: Describe the events focused on Medical & Health Sciences and Business & Entrepreneurship.
questions.answer: In Medical & Health Sciences, the 'National Health Skills' event gathers innovators, experts, and healthcare leaders for discussions and advancements in medical education. For Business & Entrepreneurship, the 'Vadodara Start-up Festival' and 'Women Entrepreneurship Meet' provide platforms for aspiring entrepreneurs to present ideas to investors and secure funding.

questions.query: What scientific and research-oriented events does Parul University host?
questions.answer: Parul University organizes 'Praman – The Forensic Fest,' an annual forensic science festival by the Department of Forensic Science, Faculty of Applied Sciences, and celebrates 'National Science Day' as a grand event for scientific spirit, innovation, and student brilliance.

questions.query: Are there specific events at Parul University that address Law, Policy, Media, and Journalism, or Leadership and Culture?
questions.answer: Yes, 'Madhyaam' and 'Samvidhan Pe Charcha' are law fests bringing together dignitaries for insightful discussions on India’s judicial system. The 'Vadodara Leadership Conclave' showcases leadership and diplomacy from prominent personalities, and the 'Vadodara Literature Festival' gathers authors, thought leaders, and diplomats for discussions on literature and culture.

questions.query: What is the fundamental role and focus of Parul University's Research & Development Cell?
questions.answer: The Research & Development Cell at Parul University serves as a cornerstone for the continuous pursuit of knowledge and groundbreaking insights across numerous fields. Its central focus is to facilitate various platforms for students and faculty to conduct research, develop innovative solutions, and provide practical solutions to society’s pressing challenges.

questions.query: What is the extent of funding and publication achievements in research at Parul University?
questions.answer: Parul University's extramural research projects have received over ₹17 crore in sponsored grants from reputable organizations. The university also boasts 319 Ph.D. research guides and has published over 5,500 scientific research papers. Faculty members are actively engaged in intramural research, leading to numerous patent and copyright filings and publications.

questions.query: Who is Dr. Anand Joshi, and what are his key contributions and expertise in research at Parul University?
questions.answer: Dr. Anand Joshi is the Director of the Micro-Nano Research and Development Center at Parul University, with over 21 years of experience in R&D. He holds a Ph.D. in Mechanical Engineering from IIT Roorkee and specializes in vibration, nano biosensors, nano mechanics, and functionally graded materials. He has received a Fast Track Research Grant from DST, has 50 publications (one being a 'Top 25 hottest article' and most cited in Physica E since 2008), and serves as an advisor/member for national and international conferences.

questions.query: What is the vision and mission guiding the research foundation at Parul University?
questions.answer: The vision of the research foundation is to establish Parul University as a globally acclaimed university with a strong R&D foundation. Its mission is to inspire and motivate students and faculty members to engage in community-centered, evidence-based, inter-disciplinary research with significant socio-economic values.

questions.query: Name and describe some of the advanced research facilities and centers of excellence available at Parul University.
questions.answer: Parul University houses several advanced research facilities, including the Micro-Nano Research & Development Center, an advanced lab for micro-nano technology research; Environmental Sciences, a leading facility for advanced environmental research; and a DSIR research and development centre, fully equipped for advanced multidisciplinary research initiatives.

questions.query: What are some notable grants Parul University has secured for its extramural research projects?
questions.answer: Parul University has secured significant grants for extramural research, including ₹2.44 Cr from the Royal Academy Of Engineering, UK, ₹63 Lakhs from the European Union Funded CABCIN Project, ₹9.46 Cr from ICMR (Indian Council of Medical Research), and ₹82 Lakhs from the Gujarat Council of Science Technology.

questions.query: What are the unique features of Parul University's research program, particularly concerning student and faculty engagement and collaborations?
questions.answer: The research program provides orientation, training, support, and networking opportunities for students and faculty. It encourages students to undertake translational/developmental research internships/dissertations/PhD theses with a 'community in the sight' focus. It also fosters collaborations with academic, industrial, government, and non-government organizations for research capacity building and emphasizes scientific documentation, publication, and dissemination of research activities.

questions.query: What is the university's record regarding patents filed, published, and granted?
questions.answer: Parul University has a strong record in intellectual property, with 425 patents filed, 271 patents published, and 27 patents granted, contributing significantly to the academic knowledge bank.

questions.query: What is the primary role of the Office of Student Welfare at Parul University?
questions.answer: The Office of Student Welfare at Parul University is dedicated to supporting student well-being, activities, and overall development. Its mission is to create enriching experiences, build communities, and offer comprehensive support that empowers students to thrive throughout their academic journey. This includes guidance on career paths, health and wellness resources, and opportunities for peer connection.

questions.query: What career development resources does Parul University offer to its students?
questions.answer: Parul University's Career Development Cell, known as Career Compass, serves as a comprehensive resource for students seeking internships, placements, and career advice. It provides career readiness workshops, mentorship and guidance, and facilitates internships and placements. The cell also assists with resume-building workshops, mock interviews, industry tie-ups, and job fairs to help students secure their desired careers.

questions.query: What medical and health services are available on campus for students?
questions.answer: The university prioritizes student health by offering comprehensive medical care through its 750-bed multi-specialty Parul Sevashram Hospital, located directly on campus. Students have access to 24/7 medical support, ambulance services, and student health cards. Additionally, on-campus wellness programs are provided, focusing on mental health, nutrition, and fitness to ensure a safe and healthy campus environment.

questions.query: How does Parul University support students with financial needs?
questions.answer: Parul University offers various scholarships and financial aid options to support students' ambitions and ensure their education progresses with the necessary assistance. These include both merit-based and need-based scholarships. The university also provides work-study opportunities on campus, allowing students to earn while they learn and further alleviate financial concerns.

questions.query: What transportation options are provided for students commuting to Parul University?
questions.answer: Parul University offers safe and reliable bus and shuttle services for students. These services feature an extensive network of buses covering Vadodara city and neighboring areas, making commuting to campus convenient. Students can avail themselves of affordable and convenient travel passes, and all buses are GPS-tracked to ensure safety and punctuality.

questions.query: What kind of accommodation services are available for students at Parul University?
questions.answer: Parul University provides campus residence and accommodation services designed to offer comfort, community, and convenience. This includes separate, fully furnished hostels for both boys and girls, equipped with essential amenities, dining facilities, Wi-Fi, and 24/7 security. The university also offers assistance for off-campus housing and has a dedicated accommodation support team to help students feel at home from day one.

questions.query: How does Parul University support student mental health?
questions.answer: Parul University prioritizes student mental health through its 'Insight - Mental Health Services.' This initiative offers professional counseling services, workshops, and peer support programs aimed at fostering a healthy mind and balanced life. Key components include 'Mindful Moments' for guided sessions to pause and reconnect, 'Support That Speaks' providing safe spaces for open conversations and growth, and 'Wellness in Community' which celebrates togetherness through joyful experiences.

questions.query: What is the Student Management Information System (MIS) and what features does it offer?
questions.answer: The Student Management Information System (MIS) is a personal portal designed to help students stay organized and updated. It provides easy access to academic records, attendance, schedules, grades, timetables, and announcements. The system features a user-friendly interface for smooth navigation and delivers regular updates and notifications for important deadlines, serving as a central hub for all student-related information.

questions.query: Does Parul University offer international exchange opportunities for students?
questions.answer: Yes, Parul University has active collaborations with over 75 international universities and institutions across Europe, Asia, and North America. Through these partnerships, students can participate in semester exchanges, summer schools, and short-term study programs, gaining valuable global exposure and cross-cultural learning experiences.

questions.query: What is Parul University's primary commitment regarding student welfare?
questions.answer: Parul University's primary commitment regarding student welfare is to create a safe haven of learning for all its students. This commitment is reflected in its efforts to build an educational environment that serves the best interests of every student, with an utmost priority on their safety and well-being, including measures to curb the use of narcotics.

questions.query: How does Parul University ensure a narcotics-free campus environment?
questions.answer: Parul University implements active steps to ensure the highest vigilance against the use and abuse of substances, striving to create a narcotics-free campus. This includes well-defined procedures for screening at entrances, the use of sniffer dogs, and collaborations with local authorities and the police narcotics department to spread awareness and curb substance use.

questions.query: What security measures are in place at the campus entrances of Parul University?
questions.answer: At Parul University, a comprehensive security ecosystem operates behind the scenes to ensure student safety. This includes well-defined procedures for screening at entrances, an extensive and reliable security team available 24 hours a day, and a reliable method for communicating with campus community members regarding safety concerns. These layers work together to create an atmosphere of safety and confidence.

questions.query: How does Parul University collaborate with local authorities for student safety and welfare?
questions.answer: Parul University has developed various collaborations with local authorities and the police narcotics department to enhance student security. These partnerships help in spreading awareness about narcotics and substance abuse, informing students about legal frameworks, and ensuring that the university's vigilance measures align with regulatory procedures. The police also support in keeping students aware of growing concerns and how to stay on the right side of the law.

questions.query: What is the role of the evening task force in ensuring student security at Parul University?
questions.answer: The evening task force at Parul University is a core component of its student security measures. Comprised of dedicated teaching and non-teaching staff members, this force actively watches over the campus and conducts rounds to safeguard resident students. Their presence, along with a vigilant commando team and campus police on duty, ensures that students can focus on their studies without concerns about their safety.

questions.query: Does Parul University provide safety measures for students living off-campus?
questions.answer: Yes, Parul University's commitment to student safety extends beyond its campus gates. A dedicated team of specially trained personnel makes regular visits to off-campus student homes. This initiative aims to create a vital link between university life and students' experiences beyond campus, ensuring continuous concern for their well-being regardless of their location.

questions.query: What is the overall scope and size of Parul University's library system?
questions.answer: Parul University boasts an extensive library system with over 18 libraries, each designed to foster curiosity, innovation, and academic excellence. Collectively, these libraries house more than 2,18,912 books, provide access to over 30,186 e-journals, and include 730 e-books. Specific facilities mentioned include a Medical College Library, BBA Library, and a Central Library, all serving as dynamic knowledge centers for students and faculty.

questions.query: What digital resources and e-databases are available through Parul University libraries?
questions.answer: Parul University libraries offer a wide array of state-of-the-art e-resources and specialized databases to support research. These include IEEE (IEL), EBSCO: Business Source Elite, DELNET, Bentham Science, Manupatra (Law), Micromedex (Pharmacy), Knimbus remote access, Institutional repository, J-Gate complete, BMJ journal smart collection, Web of Science, and SCOPUS. Additionally, the Gyanoday Bhavan Knowledge Web Portal provides access to e-databases, e-books, e-journals, e-newspapers, a Video Library, Online Courses, NPTEL, NDLI, and Swayam.

questions.query: How can students and faculty access library e-resources from off-campus?
questions.answer: Parul University Library provides remote access to its e-resources and online databases. Users can visit the Parul University Libraries website and access 'Knimbus Remote Access' under 'Our Resources.' They need to register themselves by following the required steps using their PU email address. A confirmation notification is typically received within 24 hours after registration. For any queries, users can contact library@paruluniversity.ac.in.

questions.query: What smart library features are implemented to enhance user experience at Parul University?
questions.answer: Parul University libraries incorporate several smart features to streamline access and enhance the user experience. These include the SOUL 2.0 library software, a barcode-enabled system for seamless book issuance. An Online Public Access Catalogue (OPAC) allows users to quickly locate books and resources. The university also offers book bank schemes, enabling students to borrow textbooks for an entire semester or year without hassle.

questions.query: What is the 'Gyanoday Bhavan Knowledge Web Portal' and what does it offer?
questions.answer: The 'Gyanoday Bhavan Knowledge Web Portal' was developed by Parul University, particularly during the pandemic, to enhance accessibility to online resources and ensure continuous learning. This portal provides easy access to a diverse range of online materials, including e-databases, e-books, e-journals, e-newspapers, a Video Library, and Online Courses across various subjects. It also grants users access to government-run educational portals like NPTEL, NDLI, and Swayam, offering free course materials for students and reliable teaching resources for faculty.

questions.query: Does Parul University Library provide services for plagiarism checking?
questions.answer: Yes, Parul University Library offers plagiarism-checking services using Urkund and Turnitin. To obtain a plagiarism report, users must submit their document in DOCX file format to library@paruluniversity.ac.in. Guidelines for using these tools are also available on the library website. Additionally, the library can provide information on free plagiarism detection tools such as plagiarismchecker.co, smallseotools.com/plagiarism-checker, scanmyessay.com, duplichecker.com, and checktext.org.

questions.query: Are there any charges for online library services provided by Parul University?
questions.answer: All online library services offered by Parul University Library are free of cost for any registered student, faculty member, or staff member. The only exception mentioned is the 'Library Books @YourDoorStep' service, which may incur charges.

questions.query: How does Parul University Library support research scholars in their research work?
questions.answer: The Parul University Library provides dedicated support to research scholars in their research endeavors. This assistance includes guiding them through literature searches, offering publication support, and helping in the identification of relevant resource materials. Research scholars are encouraged to contact the Library Research Support team for further guidance.

questions.query: What are the physical resources available in the Gyanoday Bhavan library?
questions.answer: The Gyanoday Bhavan library houses a substantial collection of physical resources, including 1,50,000 books, 450 journals and magazines, and 10,000 CDs/DVDs/Books. It also offers spacious and comfortable reading areas with an aesthetic, student-friendly ambiance, designed to make reading an immersive experience, and operates with flexible timings to accommodate users.

questions.query: What is the primary purpose of the faculties and institutes at Parul University?
questions.answer: The faculties and institutes at Parul University are primarily designed to foster academic excellence and professional growth across diverse disciplines.

questions.query: What kind of learning environment does Parul University offer to its students?
questions.answer: Parul University offers an integrated learning environment, led by accomplished educators and industry experts, with programs spanning traditional, technical, and emerging fields.

questions.query: What resources are provided in each institute at Parul University to support student learning?
questions.answer: Each institute at Parul University is equipped with state-of-the-art resources to ensure students gain the necessary knowledge and skills to excel in their chosen fields.

questions.query: Can you list some of the faculties available at Parul University?
questions.answer: Some of the faculties at Parul University include the Faculty of Allied and Healthcare Sciences, Faculty of Public Health, Faculty of Architecture and Planning, Faculty of Applied Sciences, Faculty of Agriculture, Faculty of Ayurved, Faculty of Fine Arts, Faculty of Homeopathy, Faculty of Hotel Management and Catering Technology, Faculty of Library and Information Science, Faculty of Management Studies, Faculty of Engineering & Technology, Faculty of IT & Computer Science, Faculty of Commerce, Faculty of Law, Faculty of Social Work, Faculty of Liberal Arts, Faculty of Nursing, Faculty of Medicine, Faculty of Physiotherapy, Faculty of Pharmacy, and Faculty of Performing Arts. The Faculty of Education is also listed as proposed.

questions.query: What types of academic programs are highlighted as related links under the 'Academics' section?
questions.answer: The 'Academics' section highlights Bachelor programs for studies after 12th grade, Dual degree programs to earn twice the credentials, and Master's programs for degrees to pursue after graduation.

questions.query: What is the range of academic programs offered by Parul University?
questions.answer: Parul University offers a wide range of academic programs, from Diplomas to Doctoral programs, designed to provide a comprehensive educational pathway for students at various levels.

questions.query: What key features define the quality of education and development at Parul University?
questions.answer: Parul University is committed to advancing quality in higher education by providing best quality infrastructure & digital resources, ensuring the highest academic degree value upon graduation, fostering top quality research and innovation initiatives, maintaining quality in teaching & student development, offering a relevant curriculum on local, national & global levels, and implementing unique teaching innovations with practical training.

questions.query: Outline the steps involved in applying for admission to Parul University.
questions.answer: The application process for Parul University involves five steps: 1) Visiting the online admission portal (https://admissions.paruluniversity.ac.in) to apply for a chosen course. 2) Filling out the initial online application form with accurate academic and personal information. 3) Selecting a program or major based on qualifications, after researching available courses, careers, and professions. 4) Registering and making an online payment of the registration fee to ensure the application is reviewed and eligibility is confirmed. 5) Choosing preferred on-campus hostel accommodation if needed, noting that hostels are well-furnished and provide a friendly learning atmosphere.

questions.query: What are the different structures available for pursuing Bachelor's programs at Parul University?
questions.answer: Bachelor's programs at Parul University can be pursued through three distinct structures: 3-year regular programs, which offer a standard curriculum for an effective learning experience; 4-year honors programs, featuring an advanced curriculum with practical-based training, including a project or internship in the final year; and 4-year research programs, which are research-based and designed to provide real-time solutions, allowing graduates to advance directly to PhD. Additionally, dual degree programs are available, enabling students to combine a Bachelor's program with another Diploma or Postgraduate Diploma.

questions.query: What support resources does Parul University provide for postgraduate students?
questions.answer: For postgraduate students, Parul University offers several support resources, including the Pragya skills & simulation lab for hands-on learning and real-world application, the DISR central research lab for leading research and innovation, and a robust research incentive policy aimed at empowering industry-defining research breakthroughs.

questions.query: What are the eligibility criteria for the Bachelor of Homoeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) program?
questions.answer: To be eligible for the Bachelor of Homoeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) program, candidates must have passed the 12th Examination from the Science Stream with Physics, Chemistry, and Biology (PCB) subjects from a recognized board. Specific requirements include: General/EWS category needs 50% in PCB (Theory + Practical) and English Pass, plus a NEET (50 PR) qualification; PwD category requires 45% in PCB (Theory + Practical) and English Pass, plus a NEET (45 PR) qualification; and Reserved category needs 40% Average in PCB (Theory + Practical) and English Pass, plus a NEET (40 PR) qualification.

questions.query: What are the eligibility criteria for the Master of Physiotherapy in Sports Sciences program?
questions.answer: Candidates for the Master of Physiotherapy in Sports Sciences program must have passed a BPT degree from an institution where the mode of study is a full-time program, with a minimum duration of 4 ½ years and not less than 50% of marks in aggregate. Additionally, candidates must have completed 6 months of compulsory rotating internship in Physiotherapy Colleges recognized by the respective State Physiotherapy Council or Indian Association of Physiotherapists.

questions.query: What are the eligibility requirements for the Doctor of Medicine Homoeopathy (MD) program?
questions.answer: For the Doctor of Medicine Homoeopathy (MD) program, a candidate must have passed a Bachelor of Homoeopathic Medicine and Surgery degree or an equivalent qualification in Homoeopathy (included in the Second Schedule to the Act), after completing a course of study of not less than five years and six months, including one year of compulsory internship. Alternatively, candidates with a Bachelor of Homoeopathic Medicine and Surgery (Graded Degree) or equivalent qualification (included in the Second Schedule to the Act), after a course of study of not less than two years, are eligible. In both cases, the candidate must have qualified PG-NEET with 50 PR.

questions.query: What are the eligibility criteria for the Diploma in Pharmacy program?
questions.answer: To be eligible for the Diploma in Pharmacy program, a candidate must have passed the 12th Examination in the Science stream with Physics, Chemistry, and Maths (PCM) OR Physics, Chemistry, and Biology (PCB) subjects from a recognized board.

questions.query: What are the eligibility criteria for the Bachelor of Architecture program?
questions.answer: For the Bachelor of Architecture program, a candidate must have passed the 12th examination with Physics & Maths as compulsory subjects, along with either Biology, Chemistry, Computer Science, Information Technology, Technical Vocational Subject, Informatics Practices, Engineering Graphics, or Business Studies, with a minimum of 45% overall for the general category and 40% overall for the reserved category. Alternatively, a candidate can qualify by passing a 10+3 Diploma Examination with Mathematics as a compulsory subject, with a minimum of 45% overall for the general category and 40% overall for the reserved category. In addition to these academic requirements, the candidate must have qualified NATA or NTA (JEE Paper 2) examination in the concurrent year.

questions.query: What types of information are accessible through the examinations platform at Parul University?
questions.answer: The examinations platform at Parul University provides comprehensive information and important updates regarding examinations, including Exam Schedules, Academic Calendar, Results, Examination Notifications, Rules & Regulations, Document Verification, and other updates related to schedules and examination information.

questions.query: What are the consequences for students who violate university examination rules or code of conduct?
questions.answer: If any examinee violates university rules, they are liable to be punished under the provisions of the University rules. Disciplinary action will be taken against candidates who disobey the instructions of the supervisor, misbehave, or violate the examination code of conduct of Parul University.

questions.query: What are the specific rules regarding the use and handling of examination materials and rough work for students?
questions.answer: Students must hand over all unused answer books and other University examination materials to the Supervisor and must NOT take them from the room. For rough work, students are required to use the back of the page(s) of their answer book(s) and either cross out the rough work or clearly mark it as such before submitting their script; they are strictly prohibited from using their own paper for rough work.

questions.query: What are the regulations concerning student entry and exit from the examination hall?
questions.answer: Under no circumstances will a candidate be allowed to enter the examination hall after the commencement of the examination. Furthermore, no candidate will be permitted to leave the examination hall before 45 minutes after the commencement of the exam and during the last 15 minutes of the examination session. Students are also not allowed to leave their seat without the prior permission of the supervisor.

questions.query: What are the key responsibilities of students regarding their answer books and seating area during examinations?
questions.answer: Students must ensure that a hollow sticker is pasted on the appropriate space on the front page of the answer book after the warning bell, covering the candidate's information and the bar-code label. They must not write anything in the space provided for marks. Answers should be written in a clear and legible handwriting on both sides of the answer book in the respective Section-A and Section-B, starting each new answer on a separate page. Students must check the bar-code pasted by the supervisor on the front page and accurately enter their enrolment number, subject code, and date of exam in the designated space. Additionally, students are responsible for ensuring that no objectionable material leading to a Unfair Means (UFM) case is lying around their seat prior to the start of the examination and must inform the supervisor immediately if any such material is found.

questions.query: How can students apply for document verification and certificate requisition at Parul University?
questions.answer: From March 21, 2025, active students can apply for document verification and certificate requisition by logging into their Student MIS ID, then navigating to 'Other,' followed by 'Document Requisition,' and finally 'Apply for Document.' Passout students can access this service by entering their mobile number, generating an OTP, logging in, and then following the same path: 'Other,' 'Document Requisition,' and 'Apply for Document.' Requests submitted through the website or any other source will not be accepted.

questions.query: Provide examples of specific theory exam schedules for the Faculty of Commerce for Summer 2025-26.
questions.answer: For Summer 2025-26, the Faculty of Commerce has released various theory exam schedules, including: Theory_Exam_Schedule_B_Com(Hons)_Regular_Exam_Semester_6, Theory_Exam_Schedule_B_Com(Hons)_Supplementary_Exam_Semester_3, Theory_Exam_Schedule_B_Com_(w_e_f_2023)_Supplementary_Exam_Semester_3, Theory_Exam_Schedule_Int_B_Com_M_Com_Supplementary_Exam_Semester_5, and Theory_Exam_Schedule_M_Com_Regular_Exam_Semester_4.

questions.query: List some of the practical exam schedules for the Faculty of Physiotherapy for Winter 2025-26.
questions.answer: For Winter 2025-26, the Faculty of Physiotherapy has practical exam schedules such as: Viva_Practical_Exam_Schedule_BPT_Regular_Exam_Semester_1_Winter_2025_26_19_APC_Revised, Viva_Practical_Exam_Schedule_BPT_Regular_Exam_Semester_3_Winter_2025_26_20_PIPT_Revised, Viva_Practical_Exam_Schedule_BPT_Regular_Exam_Semester_5_Winter_2025_26_51_PIPTR_Revised, Viva_Practical_Exam_Schedule_BPT_Supplementary_Exam_Semester_1_Winter_2025_26_19_APC_Revised, and Viva_Practical_Exam_Schedule_BPT_Supplementary_Exam_Semester_2_Winter_2025_26_20_PIPT_Revised.

questions.query: When were the results for the BHMS Regular Exam, Year - 3, Feb 2026 (S 2024-25) officially declared?
questions.answer: The results for the BHMS Regular Exam, Year - 3, Feb 2026 (S 2024-25) were officially declared on February 25, 2026.

questions.query: What is the content of Notification 1499, dated March 4, 2025, regarding examination work?
questions.answer: Notification 1499, dated March 4, 2025, pertains to the 'Revision in the Remuneration for Staff and Examiners Engaged in Examination Work'.

questions.query: Does Parul University offer online degrees?
questions.answer: Yes, 'Parul University Online' offers fully online, UGC-entitled BCA, BBA, MCA, MBA, and other specialized certifications for working professionals and remote students.

questions.query: What is the Pathway Program?
questions.answer: The Pathway Program allows students to complete a portion of their degree at Parul University and the remainder at a partner university abroad, earning an internationally recognized degree.

questions.query: What are the hostel accommodations like at Parul University?
questions.answer: Parul University provides extensive on-campus hostel facilities for over 10,000 students, with separate residences for boys and girls. Rooms range from basic sharing to premium AC en-suite rooms.

questions.query: Is the food provided in the hostels hygienic and diverse?
questions.answer: Yes, multiple mess facilities and multi-cuisine food courts serve hygienic, nutritious, and diverse meals, catering to students from all Indian states and international students.

questions.query: What amenities are available for hostel residents?
questions.answer: Hostel residents have access to 24/7 Wi-Fi, laundry services, gymnasiums, swimming pools, indoor game rooms, secure banking/ATMs, and round-the-clock security with CCTV.

questions.query: What is PIERC at Parul University?
questions.answer: PIERC stands for Parul Innovation & Entrepreneurship Research Centre. It is a dedicated hub that fosters an entrepreneurial ecosystem, supporting startup incubation and patent filing.

questions.query: How does PIERC help students with startups?
questions.answer: PIERC provides seed funding, dedicated mentorship, co-working spaces, legal assistance for patents and company registration, and connects student startups with angel investors.

questions.query: Has Parul University received recognition for innovation?
questions.answer: Yes, Parul University is recognized as one of India's leading institutions for innovation, securing top ranks in the ARIIA (Atal Ranking of Institutions on Innovation Achievements) and NIRF Innovation rankings.

questions.query: [Faculty] What are the general accreditations and rankings of Parul University's faculties?
questions.answer: Parul University's faculties are officially designated as a Centre of Excellence by the Government of Gujarat, recognizing exceptional standards in academics, innovation, and research. The university is ranked among India's top 150 universities nationwide in the overall category and is recognized among the top 50 for innovation in India by the Ministry of Education's National Institutional Ranking Framework. Additionally, Parul University is accredited with the highest grade of A++ by NAAC, affirming its commitment to maintaining superior educational standards. It is also ranked among the Top 50 Indian Institutions in the Times Higher Education (THE) Impact Rankings 2025, being the only university from Gujarat to achieve this global ranking.

questions.query: [Faculty] What kind of practical training and facilities are available at the Faculty of Agriculture?
questions.answer: The Faculty of Agriculture offers a unique blend of agricultural programs designed to provide a science-based understanding of agricultural production. It combines strong theoretical foundations with extensive practical training through instructional farms, greenhouses, R&D labs, and industrial visits. Students are trained in core subjects like agronomy, soil science, horticulture, and agricultural engineering, while also gaining exposure to robotics, automation, and biotechnology. Specialized facilities include a Plant Pathology Lab, Agriculture Meteorology Lab, Botany Lab, Micro-Nano Research & Development Center, Soil & Science Laboratory, and an Instructional Farm which serves as a living classroom.

questions.query: [Faculty] What are the eligibility criteria for the Bachelor of Architecture program at Parul University?
questions.answer: To be eligible for the Bachelor of Architecture program, a candidate must have passed the 12th examination with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects, along with either Biology, Chemistry, Computer Science, Information Technology, Technical Vocational Subject, Informatics Practices, Engineering Graphics, or Business Studies. A minimum of 45% overall marks is required for the general category and 40% for the reserved category. Alternatively, candidates who have passed the 10+3 Diploma Examination with Mathematics as a compulsory subject, achieving a minimum of 45% overall for the general category and 40% for the reserved category, are also eligible. In addition to these academic requirements, candidates must have qualified for the NATA or NTA (JEE Paper 2) examination in the concurrent year.

questions.query: [Faculty] What unique events does the Faculty of Applied Sciences host to foster innovation and research?
questions.answer: The Faculty of Applied Sciences cultivates a spirit of inquiry through various events, including conferences, workshops, and hands-on research initiatives. A notable event is 'Praman,' a high-energy festival of science and investigation focused on Forensics AI. Praman allows inquisitive minds and aspiring forensic experts to engage in exciting, real-world-based experiences, such as recreating crime scenes, investigating simulated escapes, and discovering educational forensic tools powered by AI. These events encourage innovation and collaboration between academia and industry, with specialist presentations and engaged simulations.

questions.query: [Faculty] What are the key features of the Faculty of Pharmacy, including its national and global recognition?
questions.answer: Parul University's Faculty of Pharmacy has received national recognition, ranking 41st in the Pharmacy category by the Ministry of Education's National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF) for 2025. The faculty is also highly recognized for its research output, boasting over 500 Scopus-indexed publications, 30 patent applications, and securing grants from various funding agencies. On the global stage, three faculty researchers were named among the World's Top 2% Scientists by Stanford University & Elsevier in 2025, highlighting its significant contributions to pharmaceutical sciences.

questions.query: [Faculty] Who are some of the distinguished mentors and guests hosted by Parul University across its faculties?
questions.answer: Across various spheres of knowledge, Parul University has hosted numerous distinguished thinkers and leaders. These include Dr. S. Jaishankar (Minister of External Affairs, Government of India), Kiran Bedi (First Indian Woman IPS Officer, Former Lt. Governor of Puducherry), Gaur Gopal Das (Monk, Lifestyle Coach, and Author), Saina Nehwal (Indian Badminton Player), Shri Anand Kumar (Founder, Super 30), Dr. Neerja Birla (Chairperson, Aditya Birla Education Trust & Mental Health Activist), Guneet Monga Kapoor (Academy Award-Winning Film Producer), Srikanth Bolla (Indian industrialist and founder of Bollant Industries), Dr. Vijay Bhatkar (Padma Bhushan & Padma Shri, Ex-Chancellor, Nalanda University), Dr. Joseph Muscat (Former Prime Minister of Malta), Dr. Lobsang Sangay (Former Sikyong (President), Central Tibetan Administration), and R. Balki (Filmmaker & Advertising Visionary).

questions.query: [Faculty] What is the average and highest placement package offered to students across various faculties at Parul University?
questions.answer: Across multiple faculties, Parul University reports an average placement package of 4-6 LPA. The highest package offered to students has reached 60 LPA. The university also boasts over 2,200 recruiters, indicating a strong industry connection for career opportunities. Specific examples of high placements include Soumya Dhakad with 43 LPA at ServiceNow (also listed as Multi-National Company), Suhani Shah placed at Goldman Sachs, and Kondapalli Shanmukha Sai Ram with 26 LPA at BP Technology.

questions.query: [Faculty] What is the admission process for the Integrated Teacher Education Programme (ITEP) at the Faculty of Education (Proposed)?
questions.answer: Admission to the Integrated Teacher Education Programme (ITEP) is conducted through a suitable subject and aptitude test administered by the National Testing Agency (NTA). This single nation-wide entrance test, called the National Common Entrance Test (NCET), is standardized to account for the linguistic and cultural diversity of the country. The examination mode is online/Computer Based Test (CBT) in a multilingual pattern. NTA prepares a scorecard reflecting the candidate's relative performance, and admission is finalized through centralized online counseling. Candidates must indicate their chosen subjects/discipline (B.A. B.Ed./B.Sc. B.Ed./B.Com. B.Ed.) at the time of admission, with any changes allowed within one month from the program's commencement date.

questions.query: [Faculty of Engineering & Technology] What engineering disciplines are offered at Parul University?
questions.answer: The Faculty of Engineering & Technology offers B.Tech, M.Tech, and Diploma programs in diverse disciplines including Computer Science, Civil, Mechanical, Aeronautical, AI & Machine Learning, Robotics, Electrical, and Information Technology.

questions.query: [Faculty of Engineering & Technology] What kind of labs and facilities are available for engineering students?
questions.answer: The university provides state-of-the-art facilities like the iOS Center, Red Hat Academy, structural engineering labs, robotics and automation labs, and AI supercomputing labs to provide hands-on practical exposure.

questions.query: [Faculty of Engineering & Technology] Are there any specializations under Computer Science Engineering?
questions.answer: Yes, CSE students can specialize in Artificial Intelligence, Big Data, Cyber Security, Blockchain Technology, Internet of Things (IoT), and Cloud Computing.

questions.query: [Faculty of Engineering & Technology] Does the engineering faculty have industry tie-ups?
questions.answer: Yes, the faculty has strong industry-academia tie-ups with companies like L&T, TCS, IBM, Microsoft, and SAP to offer industry-embedded curriculums and excellent placement opportunities.

questions.query: [Faculty of IT & Computer Science] What programs are available under IT and Computer Science?
questions.answer: The faculty offers specialized BCA, MCA, B.Sc (IT), and M.Sc (IT) programs focusing on current software industry demands.

questions.query: [Faculty of IT & Computer Science] What practical skills do IT students learn?
questions.answer: Students learn full-stack web development, mobile application development, cloud infrastructure, database management, ethical hacking, and advanced programming languages.

questions.query: [Faculty of IT & Computer Science] Are there coding clubs and hackathons?
questions.answer: Yes, the faculty hosts active coding clubs like the Google Developer Student Club (GDSC) and regularly organizes national-level hackathons like 'Projections'.

questions.query: [Faculty of Management Studies] What programs does the Faculty of Management Studies provide?
questions.answer: The faculty offers BBA, MBA, and PGDM programs with specializations in Finance, Marketing, Human Resources, International Business, Business Analytics, and Healthcare Management.

questions.query: [Faculty of Management Studies] What is unique about the MBA program at Parul University?
questions.answer: The MBA program features an industry-vetted curriculum, case study-based learning, compulsory summer internships, and opportunities for global exchange and dual degrees.

questions.query: [Faculty of Management Studies] Does the management faculty focus on entrepreneurship?
questions.answer: Yes, Parul University strongly supports entrepreneurship through its dedicated incubation center, assisting management students in drafting business plans, securing funding, and launching startups.

questions.query: [Faculty of Applied Sciences] What courses are offered in Applied Sciences?
questions.answer: The faculty offers B.Sc and M.Sc degrees in vital scientific fields such as Biotechnology, Microbiology, Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, Forensic Science, and Biochemistry.

questions.query: [Faculty of Applied Sciences] Are the science laboratories well-equipped?
questions.answer: Yes, the applied science laboratories are fully equipped with advanced instrumentation, spectrophotometers, chromatography tools, and specialized genetic research equipment.

questions.query: [Faculty of Applied Sciences] Is there scope for research in Applied Sciences?
questions.answer: Absolutely. Students are encouraged to publish research papers, present at scientific conferences, and work on government-funded cutting-edge research projects.

questions.query: [Faculty of Medicine] What is the flagship medical program at Parul University?
questions.answer: The primary medical program is the highly competitive MBBS (Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery), alongside various postgraduate MD and MS programs.

questions.query: [Faculty of Medicine] What clinical exposure do medical students get?
questions.answer: Students receive extensive clinical training at the massive 1000-bedded on-campus Parul Sevashram Hospital, which serves hundreds of patients daily.

questions.query: [Faculty of Medicine] Is the medical college recognized by the NMC?
questions.answer: Yes, the Faculty of Medicine is recognized and approved by the National Medical Commission (NMC).

questions.query: [Faculty of Nursing] Which nursing courses are offered?
questions.answer: The Faculty of Nursing offers GNM, B.Sc Nursing, Post Basic B.Sc Nursing, and M.Sc Nursing in various specialties like pediatric, psychiatric, and medical-surgical nursing.

questions.query: [Faculty of Nursing] How prevalent is practical training in nursing?
questions.answer: Practical training forms the crux of the nursing programs, with students undergoing rigorous clinical posting at Parul Sevashram Hospital right from their first year.

questions.query: [Faculty of Pharmacy] What is the ranking of Parul University's Pharmacy Faculty?
questions.answer: The Faculty of Pharmacy consistently holds a top national ranking and features an NIRF rank within the Top 50 Pharmacy institutes in India.

questions.query: [Faculty of Pharmacy] What courses does the Pharmacy faculty provide?
questions.answer: It provides D.Pharm, B.Pharm, M.Pharm, and Pharm.D (Doctor of Pharmacy) programs approved by the Pharmacy Council of India (PCI).

questions.query: [Faculty of Pharmacy] Do pharmacy students get industrial exposure?
questions.answer: Yes, the university has ties with top pharmaceutical companies in Gujarat's pharma hub, conducting regular industrial visits, internships, and campus interviews.

questions.query: [Faculty of Architecture and Planning] What programs can I study under Architecture & Planning?
questions.answer: The faculty offers Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch) and Master of Planning (M.Plan) programs.

questions.query: [Faculty of Architecture and Planning] Is the architecture program approved by the Council of Architecture?
questions.answer: Yes, the B.Arch program is completely approved by the Council of Architecture (CoA).

questions.query: [Faculty of Architecture and Planning] What facilities do architecture students use?
questions.answer: Architecture students utilize modern drafting studios, material testing labs, 3D printing labs, and CAD/CAM software centers.

questions.query: [Parul Institute of Design (PID)] What design specializations does PID offer?
questions.answer: PID offers B.Des and M.Des programs specializing in Fashion Design, Interior Design, Visual Communication, Animation and VFX, and Product Design.

questions.query: [Parul Institute of Design (PID)] What is the learning approach at the Design Institute?
questions.answer: The approach is highly project-based and studio-centric. Students build comprehensive portfolios, participate in fashion shows (like Vadodara Fashion Week), and showcase their exhibits.

questions.query: [Faculty of Law] What legal programs are offered?
questions.answer: The Faculty of Law offers integrated programs like BA LLB, BBA LLB, BCom LLB, as well as standalone LLB and LLM degrees.

questions.query: [Faculty of Law] Are there practical legal training opportunities?
questions.answer: Yes, the law school features an active Moot Court society, legal aid clinics, and compulsory internships with NGOs, law firms, and senior advocates.

questions.query: [Faculty of Fine Arts] What programs are available in Fine Arts?
questions.answer: The faculty offers BVA (Bachelor of Visual Arts) and MVA (Master of Visual Arts) focusing on Painting, Sculpture, Applied Arts, and Art History.

questions.query: [Faculty of Fine Arts] Do students get to exhibit their artwork?
questions.answer: Yes, regular art galleries, exhibitions, and creative fairs are hosted on campus to allow students to display their creations to the public and art critics.

questions.query: [Faculty of Hotel Management & Catering] What hospitality courses are provided?
questions.answer: The faculty offers a Bachelor of Hotel Management & Catering Technology (BHMCT), B.Sc in Hospitality Management, and diploma programs in food production and culinary arts.

questions.query: [Faculty of Hotel Management & Catering] What are the facilities like for hospitality students?
questions.answer: Students train in fully-operational mock-up hotel rooms, advanced training kitchens, bakeries, and fine-dining training restaurants located on campus.

questions.query: [Faculty of Ayurveda & Homeopathy] What courses are offered in alternative medicine?
questions.answer: Parul University offers the BAMS (Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine & Surgery) and BHMS (Bachelor of Homoeopathic Medicine & Surgery) programs, along with related MD programs.

questions.query: [Faculty of Ayurveda & Homeopathy] Is there a dedicated hospital for these faculties?
questions.answer: Yes, the university operates dedicated, fully-functioning Ayurveda and Homeopathy hospitals with specialized outpatient and inpatient departments, panchakarma therapies, and herbal gardens.

questions.query: [Faculty of Physiotherapy] What physiotherapy programs are available?
questions.answer: The Faculty of Physiotherapy provides the BPT (Bachelor of Physiotherapy) and MPT (Master of Physiotherapy) with specializations in Orthopedics, Neurology, Cardiopulmonary, and Sports Sciences.

questions.query: [Faculty of Physiotherapy] Where do physiotherapy students complete their clinical postings?
questions.answer: Clinical postings and internships are conducted at the Parul Sevashram Hospital, sports rehabilitation centers, and specialized neuro/ortho clinics in Vadodara.
